# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension Site Command Center v37 Report

## Summary

v37 converts the expanded public website into a complete navigable institution. It does not remove previous pages. It preserves the v36 homepage as an archive and makes the new homepage a clean command center.

## User-facing improvements

- simplified primary navigation
- complete searchable Site Atlas
- global Site Command palette available on every public HTML page
- curated journeys for new users, executives, builders, operators, risk/legal reviewers, and advanced users
- machine-readable navigation map
- archive link for the previous v36 homepage

## Production posture

- dependency-zero publisher retained
- dynamic tests retained
- manifest-guarded kernels retained
- public demos remain browser-local
- no wallet on public pages
- no analytics, cookies, forms, accounts, or user-data capture
- legal and AGIALPHA token boundaries remain linked

## Release

`v37-site-command-center`
